description_long: A male security guard is depicted standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides, forming a T-pose. He is dressed in a formal dark suit jacket and matching trousers, complemented by a white collared shirt and a striped tie. His shoes are black and polished, and his hair is neatly styled. The uniform is professional and businesslike, lacking any visible security insignia, badges, or equipment. The overall appearance is clean and authoritative, suitable for roles in office buildings, lobbies, or upscale urban environments. The figure's posture is rigid and alert, suggesting readiness and discipline.
description: A male security guard in a formal dark suit, white shirt, and striped tie, standing upright with arms extended. The uniform is businesslike and lacks visible insignia or equipment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the guard's face, suit details, tie, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the straightness of the arm, and the side of the suit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, jacket, and both arms extended, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the right arm, and the side of the suit.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard wears a formal dark suit jacket and matching trousers, a white collared dress shirt, and a diagonally striped tie. The uniform is businesslike and standardized, with no hat or visible accessories, and the shoes are black and polished. The overall appearance is clean, professional, and suitable for upscale or corporate environments.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides in a T-pose, displaying a disciplined and alert demeanor.
